profile.name: Quentin F. Davis
profile.tagline: Crafting game systems, interactive experiences, and polished user-facing tools.
about: Full-stack software engineer and C++ game programmer with 6+ years building production systems across AI backends, cloud infrastructure, and Unreal Engine. Shipped a local AI assistant with vLLM inference and Redis-backed memory, an Azure-hosted multi-platform sync orchestration service, a cloud-ready FastAPI authorization workflow system, and a modular UE5 action RPG all from architecture through deployment. Rare cross-domain fluency across game engines, backend services, AI pipelines, and cloud infrastructure with a consistent focus on clean, maintainable code.

contact.availability: Open to game development, software, and interactive media roles.

projects.name: Project Hunter
projects.subtitle: Action RPG prototype built in Unreal Engine 5
projects.imageAlt: Fantasy forest environment used as Project Hunter showcase art
projects.summary: A modular action RPG prototype built in UE5 around survival horror pacing, component-driven character systems, and resource-aware player pressure.
projects.details: Built around modular gameplay logic, enemy pressure, and a player experience that rewards careful movement and resource awareness.
highlights: Custom gameplay systems built from ALS

projects.name: First Five
projects.subtitle: Playable visual novel prototype
projects.imageAlt: Playable First Five visual novel embedded preview
projects.summary: A dating sim / visual novel passion project built from scratch.
projects.details: Designed and developed the interaction flow, character conversations, levels, and playable experience around the heroine Karen.

projects.name: SyncBridge
projects.subtitle: Integration orchestration console for meeting and recording workflows
projects.summary: An internal admin console and Azure-backed orchestration service that syncs transcripts, action items, and recordings across Fireflies, Coda, Taskade, Descript, and StreamYard.
projects.details: Queue-backed sync control plane with a TypeScript/Express backend and React/Vite admin UI. Covers platform setup, destination mapping, webhook readiness, dead-letter recovery, and manual recording uploads — all routed through Azure Table, Queue, and Blob Storage.

projects.name: REVIA
projects.subtitle: Local AI companion with voice, memory, and live integrations
projects.role: AI Systems Engineer / Desktop App Developer
projects.summary: A locally-run AI assistant with a PySide6 desktop UI, persistent memory, real-time voice synthesis, and live Discord and Twitch integrations.
projects.details: Two-layer architecture: a Python core server handling inference, persona, memory, and integrations — and a PySide6 controller connected over REST and WebSocket. Memory is Redis-first with JSONL fallback. Voice runs locally via Qwen3-TTS with CUDA support. Extras include a YOLOv8 camera service and a demucs/whisper-backed sing mode.

projects.name: WorkingDoc Automation
projects.subtitle: Authorization record management and reconciliation web app
projects.summary: A FastAPI web app for importing, merging, and reconciling authorization records from Excel and PDF sources into a living master working document.
projects.details: Built on FastAPI with Azure App Service, Azure SQL, and Blob Storage. Handles Excel and PDF imports, smart merge logic that preserves prior manual work, fee matching, invoice generation, and a rules engine for configurable business logic. Auth is handled via Microsoft Entra ID.
highlights: Excel and PDF import with smart merge
Rules-driven fee matching and invoice generation
